headline: Adobe Nearing 52-Week Low: Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: At $205.02, Adobe (NASDAQ:ADBE) is a Hold. The stock sits within striking distance of its 52-week low of $190.12, yet the underlying business is putting up record numbers, creating an interesting disconnect in large-cap software. Adobe owns the creative software stack professionals default to (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere, Acrobat), and has repositioned around generative AI through ... Adobe Nearing 52-Week Low: Buy, Sell or Hold?

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral Rating on Adobe (ADBE) Following Topaz Labs Acquisition
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) ranks among the AI stocks beyond NVIDIA that could surge in 2026. Piper Sandler maintained a Neutral rating and a $240 price target for Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) on June 26 as the company announced the acquisition of Topaz Labs, a company that provides AI models for video and image augmentation. The company […]

headline: Adobe Just Bought What Its AI Strategy Was Missing. Here’s Why the Stock Could Surge Soon.
summary: The acquisition of Topaz Labs will help Adobe offer both content creation and content enhancement tools to users.
